name: Garen
playstyleSummary: Garen is a simple, resource-free top laner (no mana bar) designed to be low-complexity but high-durability, making him a great beginner pick. He plays like a point-and-click spin-to-win fighter, spamming Judgment in trades and finishing off low-health enemies with Demacian Justice, backed by strong self-healing when he avoids damage.
strengths: No mana bar to manage — spells only cost cooldown
Strong sustained health regeneration if he avoids damage
Tanky with reliable teamfight damage from Judgment
Simple, low-skill-floor kit that's great for learning fundamentals
weaknesses: No mobility besides Decisive Strike's speed boost — no dash or blink
Easy to kite since he has no ranged tools
Can be poked down before he gets a chance to regenerate
Fairly predictable combo that experienced enemies can play around

abilities.name: Perseverance
abilities.howToUseIt: If you avoid taking damage for a few seconds you heal a large chunk of health each second. Disengage from trades and hide behind minions or in brush to let this kick in before re-engaging.

abilities.name: Decisive Strike
abilities.howToUseIt: Use this to break free of a slow and close the gap on a target, or to start a trade. Your next attack after casting also silences them, so lead with it to shut down an important enemy spell.

abilities.name: Courage
abilities.howToUseIt: Activate before an enemy burst combo lands on you for a shield and tenacity, giving you reduced damage taken afterward. It also passively grants armor and magic resist for takedowns, so it rewards aggressive play.

abilities.name: Judgment
abilities.howToUseIt: Spin to deal damage to everyone nearby, but it hits hardest when only one enemy champion is in range — try to isolate your target instead of fighting inside a full minion wave.

abilities.name: Demacian Justice
abilities.howToUseIt: Finish off a low-health enemy champion with this execute. Save it for when it will secure a kill rather than throwing it early on a healthy target for minor extra damage.

earlyGamePlan: In lane, farm with basic attacks and use Judgment on cooldown when you can hit the enemy champion without also feeding a full minion wave. Look for trades where you can land Decisive Strike's silence to shut down their spells, then back off and let Perseverance heal you back up between trades.
quickTips: Try to fight one enemy at a time so Judgment's damage isn't diluted across minions.
Step out of vision or behind minions between trades to trigger Perseverance's strong health regen.
Save Demacian Justice for a kill rather than throwing it early — it's your best execute tool.
Use Decisive Strike's silence to interrupt an enemy's key spell in a trade, not just to gap-close.
Activate Courage right before an expected burst of damage — timing it early beats reacting after the fact.
Because you have no mana, feel free to use your basic abilities liberally on cooldown to farm and trade.
whatToExpect: An enemy Garen will try to isolate you for a spinning Judgment combo, then finish you with Demacian Justice once you're low. Fight him near a full minion wave when possible to dilute his spin damage, and be aware that if you disengage and give him a few seconds without taking damage, he heals a large amount — so commit to finishing a trade rather than poking him and walking away.

glossary.definition: Attacking or retreating while keeping distance from a melee enemy so they can't catch you.
An ability that deals bonus or guaranteed damage to low-health targets, often finishing them off.
A large amount of damage dealt very quickly, often enough to kill a target in one combo.
A stat that reduces the duration of crowd control effects applied to you.
Breaking off from a fight or trade, usually by retreating or using an escape tool.
Closing the distance to a target quickly, usually with a dash or speed boost.
Getting an enemy alone, away from allies or minions, to fight them without interference.
